title: rungia oligoneura
intro: Rungia oligoneura, also known as the Himalayan Rungia, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in the Himalayan regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rungia oligoneura include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to make tonics and remedies for various health conditions.
